human.name: Human
human.description: Versatile and resourceful, humans adapt to any situation through sheer determination.

passive_abilities.name: Adaptable
passive_abilities.description: Humans' versatility grants a small bonus to all stats.

augmented.name: Augmented
augmented.description: Born chromed: humans rebuilt around factory-installed cyberware — neural link, reflex boosters, low-light cybereyes, grafted myofiber. Their strengths are the metal's strengths, and so are its weaknesses. The metal costs them less Humanity than it costs others, but it still costs; run the ledger down and the chrome starts driving.

passive_abilities.name: Born Chromed
passive_abilities.description: Starts with a factory cyberware loadout (neural link, reflex booster, low-light cybereyes, muscle graft, adrenal booster) pre-installed at no Humanity charge. Installs cost augmented characters ~25% less Humanity than baseline races.

passive_abilities.name: Humanity Ledger
passive_abilities.description: Tracks Humanity (base CHA x 10). Every installed piece lowers the ceiling; every install spends from the pool; therapy buys it back. Low Humanity erodes effective CHA and risks cyberpsychotic episodes.

active_abilities.name: Adrenaline Surge
active_abilities.description: Trigger your implanted adrenal booster for a burst of superhuman speed. Requires the implant.

bioroid.name: Bioroid
bioroid.description: Vat-grown organic constructs engineered for labor and combat. Physically superior but socially stunted, they struggle with human interaction.

mutant.name: Mutant
mutant.description: Survivors of toxic exposure whose altered DNA grants unnatural resilience. Their appearance marks them as outsiders.

active_abilities.name: Regenerate
active_abilities.description: Channel mutated biology to rapidly knit wounds closed.

replicant.name: Replicant
replicant.description: Bioengineered humanoids, vat-grown to be more human than human. Stronger, faster, tougher than any baseline person — and tireless. But the engineered mind is brittle: stress accumulates as Resolve damage, and a replicant at the breaking point is a danger to everyone around it.

passive_abilities.name: Engineered Vigor
passive_abilities.description: Accelerated cell repair: +50% HP regeneration, and a replicant body never tires — no action costs stamina.

passive_abilities.name: Mental Stress Track
passive_abilities.description: Replicants track Resolve instead of stamina. Pushing past limits, combat trauma, and grief drain it; sleep, comfort from others, and focusing on a bonded memento restore it. Only a baseline test restores it fully. At 0 Resolve the mind breaks.

active_abilities.name: System Purge
active_abilities.description: Flush the engineered metabolism: cures poison and stops bleeding. Costs Resolve, not stamina.

synth.name: Synth
synth.description: Artificial beings with synthetic skin over a polymer chassis. Brilliant and perceptive, but their uncanny mannerisms unsettle most people.

revenant.name: Revenant
revenant.description: Clinically dead and chemically reanimated, revenants are cold-blooded enforcers sustained by a cocktail of military-grade stimulants. Their higher reasoning has deteriorated.

psychic.name: Psychic
psychic.description: Rare individuals exhibiting latent psionic ability, believed to be a spontaneous mutation. Mentally formidable but physically frail from the neurological strain.

active_abilities.name: Neural Spike
active_abilities.description: Project a concentrated burst of psionic energy into an enemy's mind.
